sections.sectionTitle: Athaliah in Judah Kumpi Tokhom Suan

verses.text: Ahaziah' nu Athaliah in a tapa a sihna a theih ciangin amah kipanin kumpi innkuan khempeuh thatsak hi

Ahih hangin Ahaziah' sanggamnu, Kumpi Joram' tanu Jehosheba in Ahaziah' tapa Joash la-in, thah dingin a kikoih kumpipa' tapate lak panin amah gukhia a, biakinn sung lupna inndei sungah amah leh a cingnu a koih hi. Tua bangin tuanu in Athaliah kiang panin amah seel a, tua ahih manin amah kithat khalo hi
Athaliah in Israel gamsungah a uk sungteng a cingnu tawh amah kum guk sung omin Topa' biakinn sungah a bu hi

Ahih hangin a kum sagihna kumin siampi Jehoiada in mi sawlin Kar mite leh kumpi inncing a ukte kiangah paisak a, Topa' biakinnsung ama kiangah samsak hi. Tua ciangin amah in amaute tungah a ngaihsutna genin Topa' biakinn sungah kiciamna khat bawl uh a, amah in amaute kiangah kumpipa' tapa a lak hi

Tua ciangin amah in amaute thu pia a, “Note hih bangin na gamta ding uh hi: Sabbath ni-in nasep pengin kumpipa inn a cing no seh thumah sehkhatte in(adang seh thumah sehkhatte Sur kulhkongpi-ah omin adang seh thumah sehkhatte a cingte' nung kulhkongpi-ah om hi) kumpi inn na cing ding uh hi
Tua ciangin Sabbath ni-in na semin Topa' biakinn a cing no a khennihte in

na khutsung uhah na hiam ciat uh tawh kumpi Joash na cing ding uh hi. Note kiang nai-ah a hong pai peuhpeuh kithat ding hi. Kumpipa a paikhiat ciang leh a sungtum ciangin amah na cing ding uh hi,” a ci hi

A ukte in siampi Jehoiada' thupiak khempeuh bangin hih uh a, Sabbath ni-in nasep a sem dingte tawh Sabbath ni-in ama mi nasep a peng dingte hong paipih ciat uh a, siampi Jehoiada kiangah hong tung uh hi
Tua ciangin siampipa in a ukte tungah Topa' biakinn sungah a om David-a' ahi teipite leh lumte a pia hi
Tua ciangin biakinn leitaw lampang, biakna tau leh biakinn kimkotah mi khempeuh a khut uhah a hiam ciat uh tawh a cingin a ding uh hi

Tua ciangin amah in kumpipa' tapa paikhiatpihin, ama lu tungah kumpi lukhu khusak a, kumpi hihna tecipan'na lai amah a pia hi. Tua ciangin amaute in amah kumpi hi, ci-in taangko-in amah sathau a nilh uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in a khut uh bengin, “Kumpipa khan'sau hen!” a ci uh hi
Athaliah in a cingte leh mite' gamlumna a zak ciangin mite' kiang Topa' biakinn sungah a pai hi

Amah a khuadak ciangin a ngeina ding bangin biakna song gei-ah kumpi thakpa dingin, kumpipa gei-ah a ukte leh peengkul tumte om a, tua gammi khempeuh in lungdamin peengkul na tum uh hi. Tua ciangin Athaliah in a puante balkekin kiko a, “Sawmsimna! Sawmsimna!” a ci hi

Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada in galkap a ukte thu pia-in, “A pua-ah tuanu paikhiatpih un. Amah a pan'pih peuhmah namsau tawh that un,” a ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa in, “ Topa' biakinn sungah amah that kei un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in tuanu man uh a, Kumpipa' inn lutna Sakol Kongpi a tun' ciangin tua lai-ah amah kithat hi
Tua ciangin Jehoiada in amaute Topa' mi ahihna ding uh Topa leh kumpipa leh mite kikalah thuciamna khat bawl a, kumpipa leh mite kikalah zong a bawl hi

Tua ciangin tua gammi khempeuh Baal biakinn-ah pai-in a biakinn a phelkek uh hi. A biakna taute leh a milimte amaute in sukham uh a, amaute in biakna taute mai-ah Baal siampi Mattan a that uh hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in Topa' biakinn-ah galvilte a koih hi

Tua ciangin amah in a ukte, a cingte, leh tua gammi khempeuh kaikhawm hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Topa' biakinn panin kumpipa paipihsuk uh a, a Cingte' Kongpi tawnin kumpipa' inn-ah a pai uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpite' kumpi tokhom tungah amah hong tu hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua gammi khempeuh a lungdam uh hi. Kumpipa' inn-ah namsau tawh Athaliah a kithah khit ciangin khuapi sung a gamdai hi.
Joash in uk ding a kipat ciangin ama khan' kum sagih pha pan hi.
